techniques.name: Thought Challenging / Cognitive Restructuring
techniques.description: A systematic process of identifying, evaluating, and modifying negative automatic thoughts.
steps: Examine the evidence for and against the thought
Rate belief in the original thought after restructuring

techniques.name: Behavioral Activation
techniques.description: Scheduling and engaging in positive activities to counteract withdrawal and avoidance.
steps: Track mood changes with activity engagement

techniques.name: Exposure Techniques
techniques.description: Gradually facing feared situations to reduce anxiety and avoidance behaviors.

techniques.name: Relaxation and Mindfulness
techniques.description: Techniques to reduce physical tension and increase present-moment awareness.
steps: Mindful observation of thoughts without judgment

techniques.name: Problem-Solving Therapy
techniques.description: A structured approach to identifying and implementing solutions to life problems.
steps: Evaluate pros and cons of each solution
Choose and implement the best solution
